---
name: triage
description: Report the unavailable triage gate for this host without performing triage.
---

# Triage Unavailable

Hard-stop immediately. Customer discovery is incomplete: the beachhead problem, first-customer profile, shared MVP jobs, source systems, language needs, and willingness to pay are not yet validated.

Perform no triage, priority assignment, execution flag, backlog mutation, commitment, dedup command or logging, downstream routing, or activation. Report only this gate and that separate authorization is required after it is satisfied.
